title: salix × heerii
intro: Salix × heerii, also known as Heer's willow, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the weeping willow (Salix babylonica). The plant contains salicin, a compound with medicinal properties similar to aspirin, which makes it useful for reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The health benefits of Salix × heerii include its potential to alleviate headaches, fever, and arthritis symptoms due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. Salix × heerii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be cautioned under medical supervision.
